name: web_fetch
description: Perform an HTTP GET request to a URL and return the response body as text or parsed JSON. Handles redirects automatically. Useful for fetching documentation, APIs, and web pages. Returns status code, headers, and response body.

url.description: The full URL to fetch (including protocol, e.g., https://example.com/api/data).

headers.description: Optional HTTP headers to include in the request (e.g., Authorization, Accept).

timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 30.

return_format.description: How to return the response body: 'text' returns raw text, 'json' parses as JSON, 'markdown' converts HTML to Markdown.
